title: M2cbridge Artificial Christmas Flowers Red Velvet Poinsettia Floral Picks for Christmas Wreath Tree Ornaments(4pcs Extra Large Burgundy)
features: Made of velvet material, they are durable and not break down easily, having the sensations of touch and texture. With the superior quality, they can be reusable for many times

The red poinsettias’ diameter are approx. 11 inches, looks gorgeous on Christmas tree, just stick the stem on the back of the poinsettia, and then bend the stem onto your tree as you need. It is very easy and will not take much of your time

Easy to assemble.Just insert the stem tip into the Christmas flower base tube then clamp anywhere you would like to decorate.It might have smell when you open the package. Just air it out for 1-2 days. The smell would go away
Package includes : 4x Christmas poinsettia flowers (11" in diameter) + 4 stems (8" in length)+ 4 clips
Great for mantle decorations,Christmas wreath,rattan,wedding decorations,room decorations,Christmas tree decorations,crafting project , holiday floral arrangements and vase
description: Product Description Beautiful Christmas decorations for Christmas tree, wreaths, table centerpieces and Xmas floral arrangements Red velvet surface , wired stem, metal clips, can be placed virtually anywhere to enhance the holiday cheer. This beautiful Christmas holiday pick adds seasonal joy to your Xmas décor. The vibrant holiday colors and combination of the season's most iconic symbols make this the perfect accessory to your Christmas tree or wreath M2cbridge Large Christmas Poinsettia Glitter Foldable Christmas Flowers Flora...
